lines.text: We have also received a call from a [REDACTED] acting as agent
for George Adamski, a [unclear] on the subject. Her telephone number was
given as [REDACTED]. She is
supposedly cooperating with the British Book Center, in the publicizing of
Adamski's books with Desmond Leslie, FLYING SAUCERS HAVE LANDED. He will
speak at our meeting this Friday April 9th. [REDACTED] has been especially
energetic in putting this meeting across, in spite of Adamski's material.
Through [REDACTED] special efforts, a Mr. [REDACTED] of the [REDACTED]
Bronx division may play reporters to this meeting, for a possible article
writeup. Other than seemed insistent that the [REDACTED] be contacted rather t
other newspapers, I have nothing to add to Mr. [REDACTED].
All information enclosed, is sent for whatever value it may have. I w
continue sending this, until I wither quit this group, or subject. It sh
be understood at all times, that this material is purely impressions I ga
from the behavior of the persons mentioned, and is not based on any concr
facts I have been able to obtain. If at any time you require corresponde
on these or any other correspondents, my files are at your disposal.
Sincerely,
[REDACTED]
ER/
Dir.
